name: Missed a week of work from warehouse injury in Holladay, paid?

mainEntity.name: Missed a week of work from warehouse injury in Holladay, paid?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, temporary disability pays ~66 2/3% wages after 3-day wait.** Utah covers lost time.[1] Key factors: Doctor certifies; insurer pays. Track hours missed. Permanent issues add more.
